'''Bomis Koori IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], and was the main gathering point of [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] [[Koorivar Fusiliers/Legends|defensive forces]] on the surrounding worlds during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
Bomis Koori IV belonged to a pocket of [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] colony worlds, it hosted [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] factories were responsible for the largest production of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="DB" />

==History==
{{Quote|I wonder how many they'll send. We've got so much firepower in here, these walls are ray-shielded. They can't take this fort. It'll probably be, uh, fifty Jedi. They'll need at least that many. Huh, maybe a hundred Jedi! They'll never take this base with less. Ha, they'll need an army of Jedi!|Oro Dassyne|audio=OroDassyne1-CW22.flac|<ref name="CW22" />}}
As a build-up to the inevitable [[Battle of Bomis Koori IV]], [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Oro Dassyne/Legends|Oro Dassyne]] piled on a gigantic amount of defensive guns on the planet, expecting a substantial [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] attack. When the attack came, it was slightly different from what Dassyne had expected, and, as a result of Jedi sabotage, the [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shield]] covering the [[Oro Dassyne's Bomis Koori IV fort|fortifications]] came down, opening up the planet to extensive [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] strikes and [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]].<ref name="CW22" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Bomis Koori fall under the control of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Utoxx Prentioch|Prentioch]]. The Imperial Warlord was later [[Siege of Bomis Koori|defeated]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at Bomis Koori.<ref name="TEA" />
